def negative_threading_lock_acquired_blocking_inside_async_def():
    rule_id = "threading_lock_acquired_blocking_inside_async_def"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "threading.Lock.acquire() called with blocking=True inside an async function, blocking the event loop thread."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
